scripts.predeploy: node -c assets/js/app.js && npm run build && node -c dist/assets/js/app.js
scripts.sync-bundle: npm run rebuild && echo '✅ Bundle synchronized - ready to commit dist/'
scripts.smoke: node -c assets/js/app.js && node -c workers/radartips-api/src/index.js && node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('./i18n/strings.json','utf8')); console.log('i18n ok')"
